seoTitle: Totnes Valley vs Touga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Totnes Valley and Touga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Totnes Valley vs Touga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Totnes Valley and Touga.
heading: Totnes Valley vs Touga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Totnes Valley, New South Wales and Touga, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Totnes Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Touga (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Totnes Valley or Touga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Totnes Valley has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Touga scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Totnes Valley scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Touga scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Totnes Valley or Touga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Totnes Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
